problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
